description: Domotz is a cloud-based network monitoring and management platform for MSPs, IT teams, and enterprises. It provides device discovery, monitoring, remote access, diagnostics, alerts, and network operations across distributed networks.
summary: Domotz exposes a REST Public API authenticated by an `X-Api-Key` header and a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.domotz.com/mcp` authenticated via Domotz account OAuth consent; no GraphQL API or first-party developer CLI was found.
